backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the 15sec app, defining data structures and logic for video posts, replies, user profiles, follow relationships, notifications, visitor stats, and admin access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the VideoPostCard layout fix (constraining card height to viewport minus header, flex video element) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the build/planning process.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and handles authentication gating and username setup modal display.
frontend/src/components/Branding.tsx: Simple branding component rendering the '15sec' logo text alongside an animated pulsing red dot.
frontend/src/components/CookieConsent.ts: Cookie consent banner that appears on first visit, persists acceptance to localStorage, and dismisses itself once accepted.
frontend/src/components/FollowButton.tsx: Button component that toggles follow/unfollow state for a target user principal, using React Query mutations and showing loading/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a top border, pinned to the bottom of the page layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with links to Home, Create, Notifications, Admin, and Account pages; displays the authenticated user's avatar and an unread notification badge.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login prompt card shown to unauthenticated users with an Internet Identity sign-in button and app branding.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Displays a dropdown panel of user notifications (likes, shares, replies), marks them as read on mount, and navigates to the relevant video or profile when clicked.
frontend/src/components/ReplyDialog.tsx: A modal dialog that wraps the VideoReplyCreator component, allowing users to record or upload a short video reply to a parent video post.
frontend/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx: A modal dialog for sharing a video post or reply, providing a copyable link and an internal share button that triggers the share mutation.
frontend/src/components/UsernameSetupMod: A blocking modal that prompts new users to choose a unique username, with debounced availability checking and profile creation on submit.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCard.ts: Renders a video post card with creator avatar, like/reply/share/delete actions, and navigates to the post detail or creator profile on click.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCreator: A form component that accepts a video file and title, uploads the video with progress tracking, and creates a new video post via mutation.
frontend/src/components/VideoRecorder.ts: A camera-based video recorder component that supports starting/stopping recording up to a max duration, switching cameras, and returning the recorded file.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCard.t: Renders a single video reply card with avatar, video playback, like/unlike, share, nested reply, and delete (owner/admin) functionality using various query hooks.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCreato: Provides a UI for creating a video reply to a post, supporting both file upload and recording modes with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/VideoUploader.ts: Handles video file selection and automatically trims videos exceeding a configurable max duration using Canvas and MediaRecorder APIs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, video posts/replies, likes, shares, notifications, and visitor stats.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS base styles and CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Account management page allowing the authenticated user to edit their profile (username, avatar), view their posts/replies, manage follow counts, toggle theme, logout, and delete their account.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard displaying user management (promote, demote, delete), active account counts, and visitor stats, with a per-row user profile lookup component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePage.tsx: Page for creating a new video post, letting the user choose between uploading or recording a video (max 15 seconds) before passing it to VideoPostCreator.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Feed page that fetches and displays all video posts sorted by timestamp in a full-screen vertical snap-scroll layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Public profile page that resolves a username to a principal, displays the user's avatar, follower/following counts, follow button, and tabs for their posts and replies.
frontend/src/pages/VideoDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single video post that shows the post and its paginated replies with a load-more button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens, border radius, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a TikTok/Reels-style mobile video card feed app, tracking the current fix request to constrain VideoPostCard layout within the mobile viewport height.
